intro: APT41, Omnistealer, and SideWinder were prominent threat actors in credential theft campaigns reported between April 12 and April 21, 2026. The activity frequently exploited the vulnerability CVE-2026-33829, targeting a wide range of sectors including technology, cloud services, government, logistics, and manufacturing. Incidents were documented across multiple regions, with specific focus on Bangladesh, Europe, North America, and South Asia, alongside globally coordinated attacks. The fourteen articles in this archive reflect a high severity landscape, with the majority of reports classified as high or critical.
